headline: CoStar Group to Report Financial Results for Second Quarter on July 28, 2026
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., July 01, 2026--CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a global leader in online real estate marketplaces, information, analytics and 3D digital twin technology in the property markets, will announce financial results for the second quarter of 2026 following the market close on Tuesday, July 28, 2026. Management will conduct a conference call to discuss the first quarter results, as well as the Company’s outlook at 5:00 PM EDT that same day.

headline: CoStar Group (CSGP) Fell Despite Solid Results
summary: TimesSquare Capital Management, an equity investment management company, released its “U.S. Mid Cap Growth Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy fell 7.72% (net) in the quarter compared to -6.35% for the Russell Midcap Growth Index. headline: 3 Mid-Cap Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Many investors pay attention to mid-cap stocks because they have established business models and expansive market opportunities. However, their paths to becoming $100 billion corporations are ripe with competition, ranging from giants with vast resources to agile upstarts eager to disrupt the status quo.

headline: CoStar Group Invests in Wikicasa, Italy’s Agent-Backed Real Estate Marketplace
summary: MILAN, July 01, 2026--CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a global leader in online real estate marketplaces, information, analytics and 3D digital twin technology in the property markets, today announced an investment in Wikicasa, Italy’s agent-backed real estate marketplace. The transaction will result in CoStar Group acquiring an approximately 30% stake in Wikicasa. Wikicasa’s shareholder base includes Italy’s leading real estate agencies - including Tecnocasa Group, Gabetti Group, RE/MAX Ital
